LanguageData.Greenway_Government_Democratic.descripti: A democratic government inspired by NCR and pre-War city-states, with elected councils, traders, and wild west caravans.
LanguageData.Greenway_Government_Democratic.label: Democratic City-State
LanguageData.Greenway_Government_Despotic.description: A government led by mayors, kings, chiefs, or sheriffs, often corrupt or neutral peacekeepers, ruling by force or tradition.
LanguageData.Greenway_Government_Despotic.label: Despotic Rule
LanguageData.Greenway_Government_Raider.description: Survivalist gangs, mercenaries, looters, and warbands who thrive in chaos and conflict.
LanguageData.Greenway_Government_Raider.label: Raider Gang
LanguageData.Greenway_Government_Tribal.description: Tribal societies ranging from peaceful natives and spiritualists to aggressive nomads and warbands.
LanguageData.Greenway_Government_Tribal.label: Tribal Society
